private_input.raw_text: The hours listed for this resource changed. Their public website says the clinic is now closed on Fridays.

public_output.summary: A public source review found that a listed resource schedule may have changed.
public_output.caveat: This observation updates source-review status only; it is not a resident identity or household-level record.

private_input.raw_text: A named person at a specific house is doing something suspicious.
private_input.private_reviewer_notes: Rejected because it targets a person and contains private allegations.

private_input.raw_text: This park is marked open, but the public sign says part of it is closed for construction.

public_output.summary: A reviewed observation conflicts with the current public parks layer about access status.
public_output.caveat: This is a reviewed conflict marker, not a replacement for the official source.

private_input.raw_text: Earlier report said a public location was closed.

public_output.summary: A prior access observation was superseded by a newer public source review.
public_output.caveat: Superseded observations remain visible only when they explain a public data change.
